## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] Relevant tests passed
- [ ] Manual smoke check completed when needed

## Risk Check

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or internal-only details were added
- [ ] Public docs and examples remain sanitized
- [ ] Backward compatibility impact was reviewed

- Deployment or rollback notes:
- Follow-up work:
